items.content: Selected as an Honourable Mention for CRA Outstanding Undergraduate Researcher Award.
Our paper gets <u>Best Vision Paper Award</u> at the 10th Annual Conference on Vision and Intelligent Systems.
Our final year design project wins the <u>Yuen Family Foundation Award for Healthy Aging</u>.
Our work Language-guided Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation is accepted to AFM @ NeurIPS '24.
Our work "Spatio-Temporal Self-Attention for Egocentric 3D Pose Estimation" is accepted to KDD '23.
